title: Developments In Nonlegume N2-Fixing Systems
abstract: Bacterial associations: rice, sugarcane, sorghum and millets, other systems, Azospirillum in combination, not fixing bacteria nitrogen. Quantification of nitrogen fixation in associative systems. The nature of rhizocoenoses diazotrophs. Improving associative nitrogen fixation: inoculation by plant breeding. Economic importance. Research and future developments
